facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Sunset Bay Restaurant hits different when the sky turns orange over the water and the day slows down. 4.8 stars across 102 reviews. That kind of rating doesn't lie. Grab a table before the sun drops. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
